testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.partialLinkText: Fiction to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"partial link text","selector":"Fiction"}.
